name: PayMore - Buy, Sell, and Trade Electronics
description_short: PayMore - Buy, Sell, and Trade Electronics is a credit repair provider based in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rated 4.9/5 with 757 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
PayMore - Buy, Sell, and Trade Electronics is a credit repair provider serving clients in Charlotte, North Carolina. With 757 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, PayMore - Buy, Sell, and Trade Electronics has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a pawn shop, camera store, cell phone store, PayMore - Buy, Sell, and Trade Electronics provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Charlotte, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. PayMore - Buy, Sell, and Trade Electronics operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Charlotte, North Carolina area who are considering PayMore - Buy, Sell, and Trade Electronics should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
